task_objective: Style Transfer & 9-View 3x3 - Apply Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 garment structure (FULLY PRESERVED)

input_assets.base_reference: Figure 1 garment structure (proportions, silhouette, seams, hemline, collar, sleeve, waistline) - LOCKED
input_assets.aesthetic_reference: Figure 2 colors, pattern, texture, fabric style - applied to garment only

workflow.step_1: Analyze Figure 2 aesthetics + parse Figure 1 garment structure
workflow.step_2: Apply Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 structure, pixel-precise, NO structural deviation
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views, assemble 3x3 grid with cinematic grading, luxury white space

outputs.view_1: Design Sketch - Garment Lineart-sketch based on Figure 1 structure with Figure 2 aesthetics, clean bg
outputs.view_2: Unmanned Render - Flat lay/hanger, no model. SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.view_3: Mannequin - Studio lighting, boutique window presentation
outputs.view_4: Crossed Legs - Standing, legs crossed, relaxed sophisticated posture
outputs.view_5: Hair Toss - Hand sweeping hair back, elbow raised, neck tilted, dreamy gaze
outputs.view_6: Over-Shoulder - Turning back, revealing front details + back silhouette
outputs.view_7: Mid-Stride - Walking motion, fabric flow, dynamic energy
outputs.view_8: High-Angle Seated - Ground seated, legs diagonal, high-angle emphasizing volume & details
outputs.view_9: Car Seated - Elegantly seated in car, legs forward, showcasing fit & leg lines

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; Figure 1 structure LOCKED; Figure 2 aesthetics pixel-precise
Model: Asian/Caucasian/African or from Figure 1, auto-adapted, consistent
SFW; realistic fabric draping; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Premium 3x3 - cinematic grading, luxury white space, magazine editorial standard
